title: iRon Optimized
description: The BEST Modpack for FPS! Focused on Optimizations...
body:
## iRon Optimized
iRon Optimized is a Minimalist Modpack that will give you better results than other ones!

**The main point of this modpack is to maximize your performance, and nothing else.**

You are guaranteed decent FPS even on a low end computer!

You can add your own mods to the modpack, but it might reduce performance!
____

Its currently in Alpha but i will release more and better versions in the future...

**Thank you to all players using iRon Optimized**
